PATIENT_ID: TEST_DELIRIUM_ENCEPHALOPATHY_001
ARRIVAL_TIME: 2026-01-10 08:00:00

[CONSULT_NOTE] 2026-01-18 14:00:00
Neurology Consult:
Reason for consult: Encephalopathy, multiple episodes of twitching, rule out seizures.
EEG performed showing moderate generalized slowing suggestive of systemic/metabolic encephalopathy.
No epileptiform discharges noted.

[PHYSICIAN_NOTE] 2026-01-19 06:00:00
Problem list update:
Acute metabolic encephalopathy
At risk for delirium
Respiratory failure on ventilator
